zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Anne of Montgomerie於1400年出生在蘇格蘭時，她的父親Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan38歲，母親Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald37歲。她於1425年6月16日與Sir Robert Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs在蘇格蘭艾斯爾阿爾德洛桑結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1450年享年50歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾莫爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Anne of Montgomerie于1400年出生在苏格兰时，她的父亲Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan38岁，母亲Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald37岁。她于1425年6月16日与Sir Robert Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs在苏格兰艾斯爾阿爾德洛桑结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1450年享年50岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾莫爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: Montgomerie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, Scottish: Scottish spelling of   Montgomery  .

variants.name: Montgomery
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Anne of Montgomerie was born in 1400, in Scotland, her father, Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan, was 38 and her mother, Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald, was 37. She married Sir Robert Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs on 16 June 1425, in Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1450, at the age of 50, and was buried in Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Anne of Montgomerie est née en 1400, à Écosse, son père, Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs le 16 juin 1425, à Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1450, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Anne of Montgomerie 1400 in Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan 38 und ihre Mutter Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald 37. Sie hat am 16. Juni 1425 in Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland Sir Robert Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1450 im Alter von 50 Jahren und wurde in Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne of Montgomerie è nata il nel 1400 nel Scotland, sua padre, Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs il 16 giugno 1425, nel Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1450, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Anne of Montgomerieが1400年にスコットランドで生まれた時，父Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossanは38歳，母Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonaldは37歳であった。1425年6月16日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアアルドロッサンでSir Robert Cunningham Lord of Kilmaursと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1450年に50歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマアウルズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Anne of Montgomerie(이)가 1400년 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1425년 6월 16일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 아드로산에서 Sir Robert Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1450년 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬모르스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne of Montgomerie nasceu em 1400, em Scotland, seu pai, Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs em 16 de junho de 1425, em Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1450, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Anne of Montgomerie родилась в 1400 г. в местности Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs 16 июня 1425 г. в местности ардроссан, аиршир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1450 г. в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности килмаурс, аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Anne of Montgomerie nació en 1400, en Scotland, su papá, Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs el 16 de junio de 1425, en Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1450, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland.
